summary: Iteration 15 testing complete. POTM voting system overhaul verified: 1) Voter identity form (name + email) required before voting, 2) Vote counts visible on all player cards, 3) Player detail modal shows vote count, percentage, and voter list, 4) Vote withdrawal and revote functionality working, 5) One vote per email per month enforced, 6) Homepage POTM section shows top 3 with vote link to /vote page. All 26 backend tests passed. All UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/votes/potm requires player_id, voter_name, voter_email - all validated
Duplicate vote prevention works via email (case-insensitive) + month_key unique constraint
POST /api/votes/potm/withdraw removes vote by email, allowing revote
GET /api/votes/potm/results returns leaderboard with voter names per player
GET /api/votes/potm/check?email=xxx returns vote status for that email
GET /api/votes/potm/player/{player_id} returns player detail with voter list and timestamps
Voter identity stored in localStorage (potm_voter_name, potm_voter_email)
Identity form validates name and email before allowing voting
Change identity button clears localStorage and shows form again
Withdraw button appears in identity bar only after voting
Player detail modal opens on player card click, shows vote count, percentage, voter list
Vote button in modal casts vote and closes modal
Homepage POTM section shows max 3 results with progress bars and vote link
All UI text is in Greek as required
seed_data_creation: Test votes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified the overhauled POTM voting system. Key changes from previous iteration: 1) Voting now requires name + email identification (stored in localStorage), 2) Email-based uniqueness replaces IP+User-Agent fingerprint, 3) Vote withdrawal and revote capability added, 4) Player detail modal shows voter list with names and dates, 5) Homepage POTM section simplified to show top 3 with link to /vote page. All endpoints tested: POST /api/votes/potm, POST /api/votes/potm/withdraw, GET /api/votes/potm/results, GET /api/votes/potm/check, GET /api/votes/potm/player/{id}.
